questions.question_text: CO Mapping Define Entrepreneur and Entrepreneurship. 1,2,3,4 Entrepreneurship is said to be the pursuit of opportunity through innovation, creativity and hard work. Please explain with the examples. 1,2,3,4 What are the methods of generating business ideas and opportunity recognition? 1,2,3,4 Discuss the role of an Entrepreneur in the economic growth and development of a country. Give examples. 1,2,3,4 What are the components of the Business Plan? 1,2,3,4 What are the broad features of the feasibility plan prepared by the Entrepreneur 1,2,3,4 What are the sources of funds in establishing any new enterprise.? 1,2,3,4 Explain any two Exit strategies for Entrepreneurs. 1,2,3,4 CO Mapping
An Entrepreneur is defined as a “vision-driven individual who assumes significant personal and financial risk to start or expand a business.” Explain with examples. 1,2,3,4
Explain in detail Schumpeter’s Innovation theory of Entrepreneurship. 1,2,3,4 CO Mapping
“Entrepreneur and Entrepreneurship are catalysts in the process of economic development and Entrepreneurs are the backbone of a developing economy”. Explain” 1,2,3,4
How are an Entrepreneur and Manager different from each other with respect to their role in business and focus. Explain. 1,2,3,4 CO Mapping
Why is External Environmental Analysis important before setting up an enterprise? 1,2,3,4
What legal formalities are involved in setting up a new business. Explain in detail. 1,2,3,4 CO Mapping
What is Venture capital financing ? Discuss the different venture capital financing schemes of the financial system. 1,2,3,4
Explain any two strategies for the growth of entrepreneurial ventures. 1,2,3,4
